bfbin2arm 0.1.4
  • Reference
    • Bayes-factor-based designs in bfbin2arm
    • ROPE-based trial design for single-arm one-stage phase II trials with binary endpoints
    • Optimal frequentist calibration for single-arm two-stage Bayes factor designs with binary endpoints
    • Optimal full calibration for single-arm two-stage Bayes factor designs with binary endpoints

Exact frequentist OCs for one two-stage two-arm BF design

Source: R/freq_oc_twoarm_helpers.R
compute_freq_twostage_oc_2arm.Rd

Exact frequentist OCs for one two-stage two-arm BF design

Usage

compute_freq_twostage_oc_2arm(
  n1_1,
  n1_2,
  n2_1,
  n2_2,
  k,
  k_f,
  test,
  p1_power,
  p2_power,
  p_null_grid = NULL,
  a_0_a,
  b_0_a,
  a_1_a,
  b_1_a,
  a_2_a,
  b_2_a,
  a_1_a_Hminus,
  b_1_a_Hminus,
  a_2_a_Hminus,
  b_2_a_Hminus
)

Developed by Riko Kelter.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
